query: Varian GammaMed HDR afterloader maximum dwell positions source transit time
citations: [Dwell position inaccuracy in the Varian GammaMed HDR ring applicator.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/21081871/)
[SU-E-T-138: Quantification of Dwell Position Inaccuracy in Varian GammaMed HDR Titanium Ring Applicators.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/28517159/)
[3D printer-based novel intensity-modulated vaginal brachytherapy applicator: feasibility study.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/32190066/)
[Image-Guided Brachytherapy a Comparison Between 192Ir and 60Co Sources in Carcinoma Uterine Cervix.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/35156639/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 21081871. 2010/09/07 00:00. PURPOSE: To quantify the dwell position inaccuracy in Titanium ring applicators 
and develop a test to be performed quarterly, after source exchange.
METHODS: Al
evidence.source_title: Dwell position inaccuracy in the Varian GammaMed HDR ring applicator.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 21081871. 2010/09/07 00:00. PURPOSE: To quantify the dwell position inaccuracy in Titanium ring applicators 
and develop a test to be performed quarterly, after source exchange.
METHODS: All three rings from our Titanium kit (30, 45, 60 deg.) were used for 
this study. EDR2 film was placed on the Simulator table and a ring was taped to 
the film, with a solid water slab as buildup. A 1-cm spacing dummy wire was 
inserted into the ring. The film was exposed using 135 kV, 80 mA, 400 mAs
evidence.search_query: Varian GammaMed HDR afterloader maximum dwell positions source transit time
